meaning: no matter if; regardless of; don’t worry about (it, him etc); doesn’t
sentence: 管它下不下雨，我们照常出发。
pinyin: Guǎn tā xià bù xià yǔ, wǒ men zhào cháng chū fā.
english: Rain or not, we'll set off as planned.

sentence: 健身房的器材都是新买的，很齐全。
pinyin: Jiànshēnfáng de qìcái dōu shì xīn mǎi de, hěn qíquán.
english: The gym equipment is all newly purchased and very complete.

sentence: 他熬夜太多，以致身体越来越差。
pinyin: Tā áoyè tài duō, yǐ zhì shēntǐ yuè lái yuè chà.
english: He stayed up too many late nights, to the point that his health kept getting worse.

sentence: 他喜欢在咖啡馆听爵士音乐。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài kāfēiguǎn tīng juéshì yīnyuè.
english: He likes listening to jazz music at the café.

sentence: 这款手机和同类产品相比性价比更高。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī hé tónglèi chǎnpǐn xiāngbǐ xìngjiàbǐ gèng gāo.
english: Compared to similar products, this phone offers better value for money.
